name: Selyodka s Gorchichnoi Pripavoi
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the herring into 1-inch x 3/4-inch pieces and set aside.
2. Mix the prepared mustard, olive oil, sour cream, black pepper, and 2 tbsp of capers in a bowl until combined.
3. Place the herring pieces in a deep dish or serving container and cover with the mixture.
4. Cover the dish and chill for 4-6 hours to allow the flavors to develop.
5. Just before serving, sprinkle the remaining capers on top of the herring.
